headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Citizens Financial (CFG) Target to $80 amid Positive Midcap Bank Backdrop
summary: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) is included among the 15 Best High Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $100. On March 2, Morgan Stanley raised its price recommendation on Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) to $80 from $73. The firm kept an Overweight rating on the shares. Morgan Stanley said it is lifting price targets by […]
